name: @getpaseo/relay-service
description: Self-hosted relay-only NestJS service compatible with Paseo's relay protocol

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json --incremental false && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); if(fs.existsSync('public')){fs.cpSync('public','dist/public',{recursive:true}); console.log('Copied public/ to dist/public/');}"
